functions.name: createAccount
functions.description: Creates a new cloud file account in Thunderbird. If the account already exists, it will not be recreated.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The cloud file provider type, e.g., 'ext-tbpro-addon-stage@thunderbird.net'.

parameters.name: configured
parameters.description: Whether the account should be marked as configured.

accountId.description: The ID of the created cloud file account.

alreadyExists.description: True if the account already existed and was not recreated.

error.description: Error message if the operation failed.

functions.name: registerProvider
functions.description: Re-registers the Send cloud file provider (the same instance Thunderbird created from the manifest) so it appears in the provider list. Idempotent. Used on sign-in.

alreadyRegistered.description: True if the provider was already registered.

error.description: Error message if the operation failed.

functions.name: unregisterProvider
functions.description: Unregisters the Send cloud file provider so it is hidden from the provider list while the user is signed out. Idempotent. The provider instance is retained for re-registration on sign-in.

alreadyUnregistered.description: True if the provider was not registered to begin with.

error.description: Error message if the operation failed.
